Title: Create a new user account
Preconditions: None
Test Data:
- name: John Doe
- surname: Smith
- email: john.doe@example.com
- password: password123
- isVenditore: false
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the user registration page
2. Enter the required user details
3. Click the "Register" button
Expected Result: - The user account is created successfully

Title: Login with valid credentials
Preconditions: A user account has been created
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page
2. Enter the email and password
3. Click the "Login" button
Expected Result: - The user is logged in successfully

Title: Login with invalid credentials
Preconditions: A user account has been created
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page
2. Enter the email and password
3. Click the "Login" button
Expected Result: - The login fails, and an error message is displayed
